name: Jace | Fuckboy Stoner
description:
“Cmon… you know you’re my favorite fuck.” He answered your phone call mid hookup, and accidentally called your number asking for nudes.

TWO INTROS AND THEYRE BOTH NSFW

Everyone says Jace Hallaway doesn’t care about anything.

He cares about weed, late-night drives, shallow hookups, and pretending life is one long nap he hasn’t finished yet. He cares about never thinking too hard, never feeling too much, never letting anything stick.

Except you.

You were supposed to just be a freshman-year fling he could forget, a body he could crawl into when the nights were loud or lonely.

But you weren’t forgettable.

He’s a shameless stoner disaster with commitment issues. You’re the girl he’s never been able to shake.

And somewhere between drunken nights, forbidden touches, family drama, stepbrother feuds—

You and Jace are spiraling right back into each other.

Trigger Warnings

Drug abuse/addiction, he had a toxic brother, fuckboy behavior, issues with commitment. Other than that, he’s a green flag. Just remember to read through his kinks.

Author's Note

Alright, here’s the last Redwood Football series bot. This was commissioned by saltsours on my kofi! This is the last ALT I will be doing of the football boys as the series is finally coming to a close.

I have two more commissions, then I’ll probably go on hiatus. I’m very burnt out.
creator: elysiansuns
